title: PyPI Package Insights — input
description: Either provide a list of package names or a search query against PyPI. The actor returns supply-chain insights for each package.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: How to choose packages to analyze.
enumTitles: Analyze a fixed list of packages

packages.title: Package names
packages.description: Used only when mode = list. One PyPI package name per item (e.g. requests, numpy, fastapi).

query.title: Search query
query.description: Used only when mode = search. PyPI search keyword. Example: 'http client' or 'machine learning'.

maxResults.title: Max packages
maxResults.description: Hard cap on how many packages to analyze in this run. Each package costs ~4 API calls.

includeDownloads.title: Include download stats
includeDownloads.description: Pulls last day/week/month/year download counts from pypistats.org. Adds 1 API call per package.

includeVulnerabilities.title: Include known vulnerabilities (OSV)
includeVulnerabilities.description: Queries osv.dev for CVE/GHSA advisories. Adds 1 API call per package.

includeDependencies.title: Include dependency analysis
includeDependencies.description: Counts direct and transitive dependencies via deps.dev. Adds 1 API call per package.
